fields.label: Debug mode
fields.description: Enable verbose dataset plugin logging (development only).

fields.label: Grace period (days)
fields.description: Days after subscription cancellation before dataset access is revoked when a plan does not specify its own.

fields.label: Access plan IDs
fields.description: Tariff plan IDs (one per line / JSON array) whose active subscription grants dataset access. Copied from the ghrm plan-grants-access pattern; the per-dataset plan link is set on the dataset editor.

fields.label: Included API calls
fields.description: Included metered read calls per period before overage (post-paid overage lands in S111).

fields.label: Enable AWS S3 backend
fields.description: Off by default. When enabled, snapshots may be stored in S3 behind the same storage port. Credentials live in var/secrets, never the image.

fields.label: S3 bucket
fields.description: Target S3 bucket for dataset archives.

fields.label: S3 key prefix
fields.description: Key prefix under the bucket, e.g. datasets.
